mapper.sql: SELECT t.*, up.name AS member_name, up.contact AS member_phone, cu.name AS assigned_to_name FROM crm_cs_tickets t LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON up.user_id = t.member_id LEFT JOIN crm_users cu ON cu.id = t.assigned_to
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO crm_cs_tickets (id, gym_id, member_id, category, title, content, status, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{gymId}, #{memberId}, #{category}, #{title}, #{content}, 'received', NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE crm_cs_tickets SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE crm_cs_tickets SET assigned_to = #{assignedTo}, status = CASE WHEN status = 'received' THEN 'checking' ELSE status END WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE crm_cs_tickets SET response = #{response}, responded_at = NOW(), status = 'answered' WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_cs_tickets WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND status = #{status}
